name: Multi-Channel Fluorescence Assembly
description: You are a microscopist processing raw data from an experiment. Create a calibrated, multi-channel composite image using the files in ~/ImageJ_Data/raw/experiment_042/. Assign mitochondria_raw.tif to Channel 1 (Red), cytoskeleton_raw.tif to Channel 2 (Green), and nucleus_raw.tif to Channel 3 (Blue). Apply spatial calibration in microns based on the pixel size information provided in microscope_metadata.txt. Ensure the cytoskeleton in the Green channel is clearly visible through brightness and contrast adjustments. Save the resulting multi-channel composite TIFF to ~/ImageJ_Data/processed/assembled_cell.tif.
